title: 4th of July Parade & Celebration
description: Alameda's beloved annual Fourth of July parade down Park Street — one of the largest in the Bay Area. Live bands, floats, and fireworks at the lagoon at dusk.

description: Opening reception for a group exhibition celebrating Black American artistic heritage. Live music, spoken word, and community gathering at Rhythmix.

title: The Woggles + Hot Laundry
description: Sweaty garage-punk double bill at Bottom of the Hill. The Woggles have been ripping through venues for decades; Hot Laundry is the local opener you won't regret catching.

title: Marcus King Band

description: Free outdoor concert featuring Sekhou Kouyate and his ensemble bringing West African rhythms and kora to Alameda's Washington Park. Bring blankets and snacks.
